calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITION
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

HEARING ON PETITION

The Petition is granted. Petitioner to submit a proposed order.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Victor M. Hwang ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

HEARING ON PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Donald Gagliardi; 408-291-6200; Donald P. Gagliardi, Bergeson, LLP; appearing as counsel for petitioner via Zoom.
No other appearances.

Hearing held. The court reviews the amended proof of service petitioner was required to file and finds it is incomplete and not adequate. The court rules as follows:

HEARING ON PETITION is OFF CALENDAR.

Judge: Harry L. Jacobs ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
